title: Nobel laureates among more than 200 experts urging action on AI's economic impact
summary: Nobel laureates, alongside over 200 experts, have called for urgent measures to address AI's profound economic impact. They warn that the transformation could surpass even the Industrial Revolution in speed and scale.
scraped_content: Business NewsTechAI Nobel laureates among more than 200 experts urging action on AI's economic impact ReutersLast Updated: Jul 14, 2026, 08:27:12 AM IST They issued ‌the jointly ⁠signed ⁠statement on Monday, warning that AI could drive a larger ​economic transformation than the Industrial Revolution but one that is "vastly ​shorter" in time frame, raising questions for workers, companies and public institutions. executive_summary: Nobel laureates and over 200 experts emphasize the urgent need for action on AI's economic impact, predicting a transformation surpassing that of the Industrial Revolution in speed and scale.
business_implications: The rapid integration of AI into various sectors could lead to significant job displacement.
Companies may need to adapt their business models rapidly to integrate or compete with AI technologies.
Public institutions will face challenges in regulating and preparing for the societal impacts of a swiftly transforming economy.
